LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHABAD OF S. FRANCISCO, INC'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST ABRAHAM AMAR AND MARINA KRUPNIK AND THEIR ATTORNEYS IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANTS MAY NOT INTRODUCE ANY EVIDENCE AT TRIAL EXCEPT FOR WHAT THEY HAVE INCLUDED IN THEIR MOST RECENT SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES. BOTH SIDES' REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO ENGAGE IN ANY MEET AND CONFER BEFORE FILING THE MOTION PRECLUDES AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IN ITS FAVOR. DEFENDANTS' SERVICE OF SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES AFTER THE FILING OF THE MOTION PRECLUDES AN AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THEIR FAVOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN B. PISER, TEL. NO. (510) 835-5582 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BORIS TREYZON & TREYZON & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (310) 407-7888 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CHABAD OF S. FRANCISCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion For Sanctions Against Abraham Amar And
Marina Krupnik and Their Attorneys is Granted in part. Defendants may not introduce any evidence at trial except for what they have included in their most recent supplemental responses. Both sides' requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Plaintiff's failure to engage in any meet and confer before filing the motion precludes an award of monetary sanctions in its favor. Defendants' service of supplemental responses after the filing of the motion precludes an award of monetary sanctions in their favor. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
